Survey.Name: Wellbeing Survey (multi-variant demo)
Survey.Description: Demo recipe for the multi-variant wellbeing template (survey-wellbeing-multi.json). Uses VersionedScores to apply variant-appropriate scoring when the survey version is resolved from acq labels and template Study.Version.

Scores.Name: wb_total
Scores.Description: Total wellbeing score (fallback if variant not resolved)

10-likert.Name: wb_total
10-likert.Description: Mean wellbeing score (10-item Likert form, 1-5 scale)

7-likert.Name: wb_total
7-likert.Description: Mean wellbeing score (7-item short form, 1-5 scale)

10-vas.Name: wb_total
10-vas.Description: Mean wellbeing score (10-item VAS form, 0-100 scale)

ScoringGuidelines.en: The variant used for each file is resolved from the filename acq label (or template Study.Version fallback). The VersionedScores section selects the appropriate item set and range automatically.
